title: 🎉 Site Launched!
description: Welcome to kyu.clareon.live — the student hub for Kyambogo 2026/2027 admitted students. Join the WhatsApp group to connect with fellow students and stay updated on new resources.

title: 📚 Past Papers Coming Soon
description: We're working on uploading past papers for BITC, BEEM, and Nursing programs. The first batch will be available by the end of the month. Stay tuned for updates!

title: 🧪 Quiz Episodes Now Available
description: Practice quizzes are now available for select course units. Test your knowledge and get instant feedback on your answers. New episodes added weekly.

title: 📱 Follow Us on WhatsApp
description: Join our WhatsApp channel for fresh revision updates and instant notifications when new resources are added. Click the button in the footer to join.

title: 👥 100+ Students Joined
description: We've hit 100 students in the Kyambogo 2026/2027 group! Thank you to everyone who has joined and contributed to building this community.

title: 🚀 Contribute Your Resources
description: We're now accepting resource submissions from students. Visit the Contribute page to share past papers, notes, or quizzes with fellow students.

title: 📖 BEEM Resources in Development
description: We've started adding resources for the Bachelor of Environmental Engineering and Management program. More content coming soon!
